ddt:Target.Name: CAMAN X98 V2
ddt:Target.Description:
Date: 07 décembre 2010
Version V2 pour soft B2 pour le CAMAN X98
Pilote Developpement Electronique: L. PREVOT Tel: 56441

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: ILW_VBatt
Data.Description:
Max value = 18V

FF = 25,5 V ==> unavailable value

The indicated supply is measured after the diode of protection in input, it means ther is a voltage drop of 0,8 in 0,9V.

Data.Name: IH_VehicleSpeed
Data.Description:
Max value 250 km/h

FF = 255 km/H ==> Unavailable value

Data.Name: IH_ExternalTemp
Data.Description:
Max value 60°C

FF = 215 °C ==> unavaible value

Data.Name: IH_EngineRPM
Data.Description:
Max value 8191,75 rpm

FFFF = 8191,875 rpm ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: IH_EngineCoolantTemp
Data.Description:
Max value 130°C

FF = 215°C ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: IH_ACCompValveCurrent
Data.Description:
Max value 1A

7F = 1,27A ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: OH_ACMinEngineIdleSpeedRequest
Data.Description:
Max 1200 rpm

F = 1250 rpm ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: OH_ACCompPowerUsed_V2
Data.Description:
Maximal value = 12700V

FF = 12750 W ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: D_IH_EvapTemp
Data.Description:
Default Value = 62

Information only for PDE (D_IH_EvapTemp on 8 Bits, but the value ILW and tranfered to HLS than IH is on 10  bits (resol is 0,1))

Data.Name: IH_ElectricalPowerDrived
Data.Description:
MaxValue = 3000W

1F = 3100W ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: IH_NightRheostatedLightMaxPerCent
Data.Description:
Max value 100%

FF = 102% ==> unavailable value

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range/zero adjust failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked
APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

Data.Name: CL_WithLINBus
Data.Comment: configuration de la présence du Bus LIN

Item.Text: APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

Data.Name: EngineeringCalibrationNumber
Data.Description:
The "Engineering Calibration Number" frame can be accessed by th
e function ReadDataByIdentifier ($22) with parameter $F9102. The data which is read indicates the calibration study reference. It is the only calibration reference available before ENVU.

Data.Name: EngineeringSoftwareNumber
Data.Description: The "Engineering Software Number" frame can be accessed by the function ReadDataByIdentifier ($22) with parameter $F9101. The data which is read indicates the software study reference. It is the only software reference available before ENVU.

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Description: Value given by RENAULT for each software version

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Description: During the development phase, these values should be equal to $00. At first delivery to the plant, these values will be equal to $01. They will then be incremented during the modifications in accordance with the reasons for the changes.

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Description: During the development phase, these values should be equal to $00. At first delivery to the plant, these values will be equal to $01. They will then be incremented during the modifications in accordance with the reasons for the changes.

Data.Name: PartNumber.LowerPart
Data.Description: Value given by RENAULT for each software version

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.LowerPart
Data.Description: Value given by RENAULT for each software version

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Description: Value given by RENAULT for each software version

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Description: The "VehicleManufacturer_KitAssemblyPartNumber" frame can be accessed y the ReadDataByIdentifier function ($22) with parameter $F18E. The data which is read indicates the reference of the part ordered by DLI to supply the assembly line, it is a "5 digit" type reference. The conformity check must be carried out uing this reference.

Data.Name: OH_MinimumVoltagebyAC
Data.Description:
Maximal value = 15V

F = 15,25 V ==> unavailable value

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Description: The "VehicleManufacturer_SparePartNumber" frame can be accessed by the function ReadDataByIdentifier ($22) with parameter $F187. The data which is read indicates the reference of the part to be ordered if the ECU needs to be replaced; it is a "5 digit" type reference.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: Requete non utilisable dans les outils standard de DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Test.Description: Failure : Short-circuit to the probe inside the sensor

Button.Text: Write Renault Kit Assembly Part Number
Read Renault Kit Assembly Part Number
